timerDesign.title: Timer Style
timerDesign.aiArtWarning: Yes, it’s AI art. Don't sue me bro! Do yourself a favor and add your own pictures. 😉
timerDesign.dragToReposition: Drag elements in the preview to reposition them.
timerDesign.resetAllSettingsConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all timer designs to their default state? This cannot be undone.
timerDesign.deletePhotoUsedInPresets: This photo is used in the following presets:
timerDesign.deletePhotoWarning: Deleting it will reset these presets to default backgrounds.
timerDesign.storageLimitReached: Storage limit reached. Try deleting some added photos or reducing the number of rotating backgrounds.
timerDesign.permanentStorageLimitReached: Permanent storage limit reached. The design is saved for this session, but may not persist after a reload. Try deleting some older presets or photos.
timerDesign.couldNotSavePhoto: Could not save photo. Your storage is full (limit ~5MB total). Please delete some old photos first.
timerDesign.resetAllMessage: This will return all slides, colors, and layout settings to their default values.
timerDesign.resetAllSubMessage: Your added photos and saved presets will NOT be deleted.
